rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re: Sixth Cause Of Action For Declaration Judgment And Defendants Related Affirmative Defenses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 6, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION, SHAO YAN CHEN, HAN LIN LIU, ZHI HUA MO, YUK YEE CHENG, HUI ZHEN HU, JIN QING ZHAO, RUIZHAO WU, QI WU MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re: Sixth Cause Of Action For Declaration Judgment And Defendants Related Affirmative Defenses is CONTINUED to March 25, 2020 at 9:30 am in Department 501 pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B for Defendants' to provide courtesy copies. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 516 ELLIS I7, LP VS. GLORIA FORTIER ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN WONG VS. BRITTANY CREED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 6, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN WONG Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Plaintiff will be awarded $775 in costs and $225 in attorney's fees. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DON RAMON'S REAL ESTATE, LLC VS. DE LA MANCHA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 6, 2020 line 4. DEFENDANT DE LA MANCHA, BRIAN ALVAREZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to state a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/CFH)
